crime.value: Mass murder of a clan family - mother and sister slaughtered, method unclear
crime.quote: My Mom was killed and I couldn't save her, my sister was slaughtered and I couldn't protect her.

victim.value: The Aizen clan, targeted as heir-bearing family by unknown assassin
victim.quote: Your the heir of the clan? He asked.

culprit_and_motive.value: Unknown assassin with cold laugh, motive unclear but targets clan hierarchy
culprit_and_motive.quote: He had a laugh so cold a laugh that would make anybody tremble in fear.

investigator.value: Yoshimaru Aizen, surviving clan heir seeking vengeance rather than investigating
investigator.quote: For my name is Yoshimaru Aizen, The last remaining Heir!

social_world.value: Clan hierarchy with heir inheritance system and servant-master relationships
social_world.quote: Your the heir of the clan? He asked... Shishimaru was only a servant, he wasn't like me nor Hanatoro

investigator_wound.value: Protagonist's trauma from failing to protect family and survivor's guilt driving revenge quest
investigator_wound.quote: I was supposed to protect her, and I failed... Our souls can't rest until you reach your goal

_meta.title: ebook legacy jackson akatsuki no kuruma
